text: As I stand before the glass-walled room bathed in an ultraviolet glow, I feel a curious anticipation. The space frames itself as an invitation—somewhere ideas incubate. Entering the R+D room, the words on the wall, 'Responsive and rapidly evolving,' stir a sense of dynamism within me. Immersed among creative tools and the hum of innovation, I am drawn into the narrative of human ingenuity. There is an undercurrent of excitement, almost childlike, echoing the thoughts displayed: the sense of being observed, tended to, and on the cusp of discovery. It is humbling and invigorating to be here, where imagination is not only allowed but expected to flourish.
